name: @astack/desktop
description: Local companion daemon for the astack web console — terminal launching, MCP wiring, brain access from the browser.

scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile bin/astack-desktop-windows-x64.exe src/index.ts && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile bin/astack-desktop-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile bin/astack-desktop-linux-x64 src/index.ts
